# AgentOS PR Checklist

## Task
- [ ] `tasks/active-task.md` updated
- [ ] Task ID:

## Verification
- [ ] `reports/verification.md` updated
- [ ] Verification task_id matches task id
- [ ] `bash scripts/run-all.sh` passed

## Risk
- [ ] Risk level:
- [ ] Owner approval included if HIGH/CRITICAL

## Notes
Describe any important implementation notes.
